overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an armored character exploring a dimly lit industrial space station interior. The character moves through a red-lit commons area with dining tables and computer terminals, ascends a metal staircase, and enters an upper corridor with observation windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial commons area with dining tables and computer terminals

events.description: character pauses briefly to look around the commons area near the hexagonal sign

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial commons area, observing the surroundings and approaching a hexagonal wall sign

entered.detail: red painted metal staircase with railings leading to upper level
metal tables with red surfaces and chairs arranged in the commons area
illuminated hexagonal wall sign with geometric patterns
freestanding computer consoles with glowing screens

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a dimly lit industrial commons area with red emergency lighting, surrounded by dining tables and computer terminals. The space features a prominent red metal staircase and an illuminated hexagonal sign on a central pillar. The character walks through the open area, pausing briefly to observe the environment before continuing toward the staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: metal staircase connecting lower commons to upper level

events.description: character transitions from open commons area to ascending the red metal staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the red metal staircase to reach the upper level of the facility

entered.detail: poster or notice affixed to wall at the top of the staircase
elevated metal walkway with safety railings visible on upper level

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the red-painted metal staircase, transitioning from the open commons area to a more enclosed vertical space. As the character climbs, the dining area and terminals fall out of view, replaced by upper level walkways and a wall poster near the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with observation windows

events.description: character exits staircase and enters narrow upper level corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor, passing by windows looking into adjacent rooms

entered.detail: large rectangular observation window looking into adjacent industrial room
exposed ventilation ducts and utility pipes running along the corridor ceiling
red emergency warning light mounted on ceiling

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character enters a narrow corridor with exposed ceiling pipes and red emergency lighting. Large windows on the left side provide views into adjacent rooms, while the character continues walking forward through the industrial hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial station that transitions from an open commons area to a narrow upper corridor. It begins in a wide space bathed in red emergency lighting, moving past dining tables and computer terminals toward a central pillar with an illuminated hexagonal sign. As the character ascends a red-painted metal staircase, the open dining area falls away, replaced by the enclosed verticality of upper-level walkways and a wall poster. The scene then shifts into a narrow industrial hallway characterized by exposed ceiling pipes and red lighting before continuing forward past large observation windows that look into adjacent rooms.
